# ship-manifest.txt — the ONE home for ship/dev classification (#43).
# Format: one entry per line, "<CLASS><TAB><repo-relative path>". CLASS is
# PRODUCT (ships to a user estate via install.sh) or DEV (development
# infrastructure — never leaves this repo). TAB-delimited so paths with
# spaces (e.g. General AI-Knowledge/) parse cleanly. Lines starting with #
# and blank lines are ignored. Every tracked file appears in EXACTLY one
# class; the demo classification guard enforces both directions. This file
# is itself DEV (it never ships). Edit here when you add or move a file.

PRODUCT	.gitattributes
DEV	.github/CONTRIBUTING.md
DEV	.github/scripts/branch-coherence.sh
DEV	.github/scripts/branch-grammar.sh
DEV	.github/scripts/check-issue-ref.sh
DEV	.github/scripts/docs-check.sh
DEV	.github/scripts/gate-waiver.sh
DEV	.github/scripts/make-scratch-estate.sh
DEV	.github/ship-manifest.txt
DEV	.github/workflows/demo.yml
DEV	.github/workflows/docs.yml
DEV	.github/workflows/governance.yml
DEV	.github/workflows/windows-witness.yml
PRODUCT	.gitignore
